name: The Quality Assurance Analyst
effect: Identify defects before they reach production. This card is considered thorough.

clauses.name: FINDINGS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a defect is documented: It is considered known and therefore manageable.

clauses.name: TIMELINE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the release deadline has been announced: This card's findings are considered advisory.

clauses.name: SHIP ANYWAY EFFECT
clauses.rule: If stakeholders outnumber testers in the sign-off meeting: All outstanding defects are reclassified as post-launch enhancements.

witness_quote: We'll fix it in the next sprint.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Were any of these actually fixed before launch?
